news.t: From Coke to GM: Decode the Q1 Earnings Wave Through ETFs

holdings.infoBox: DVLU is an equity ETF with a total of 52 individual holdings. The top holdings are Dell Technologies stock at 5.35%, TD SYNNEX at 3.81%, Invesco at 3.39%, Delta Air Lines at 3.37%, and General Motors Company at 3.34%.

overview.description: The First Trust Dorsey Wright Momentum & Value ETF (DVLU) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Dorsey Wright Momentum Plus Value index. The fund tracks an index of 50 large- and mid-cap value stocks exhibiting relative strength. Holdings are weighted by value metrics. DVLU was launched on Sep 5, 2018 and is issued by First Trust.
infoTable: Dorsey Wright Momentum Plus Value Index

data.title: From Coke to GM: Decode the Q1 Earnings Wave Through ETFs
data.text: While the markets are generally fixated on what the Magnificent Seven is doing in terms of first-quarter earnings, there are other names investors may want to track. This morning's earnings bonanza wa...
